rows.label: tev068101_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Ge Jewhe about recent developments.

rows.label: tev068101_MSG0001
rows.name:
I once battled with the Milsaadi
near the Forgotten Mining Frigates.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068101_MSG0002
rows.name:
Even alone, they could fell lesser opponents
in a stroke. But they were not alone—the insects
at their command attacked me relentlessly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068101_MSG0003
rows.name:
They were worthy warriors indeed. In the
end, I was unable to claim victory.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068101_MSG0004
rows.name:
If you head that way, you should
challenge them. If nothing else,
they will make you stronger![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068101_MSG0006
rows.name:
I intended to go out hunting, believing
I might replenish our food stores...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068101_MSG0007
rows.name:
But when she found out, Vi Sezha rose
against me like a thunderstorm. It took
half a day to convince her to let me go![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068101_MSG0008
rows.name:
I suppose my days of leaving her
to do my own thing are well done.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068101_MSG0009
rows.name:
The laws of Lars have
nothing on that one's grip.[ST:wait ]
